pages.title: Canine Welfare Stats
pages.text: $(l)Includes:$() Dogs, Wolves $(br2)$(l)Susceptible to:$() Heartworms, Ringworm, Botflies, Fleas, Ear Infections, Abrasions, Infections, Rabies
$(l)Other Info:$()$(br2)Can have Traits. $(br2)Requires consistent brushing (can become dirty). $(br2)Requires feeding (Kibble).
